title: last_n drops the most recent entry
body: Calling last_n(entries, 2) returns only 1 entry and it's not the newest. Expected: the last n entries including the most recent one. See test_last_n_returns_newest.

title: total() crashes when an entry has amount=None
body: Pending entries have amount=None until they clear. total() raises TypeError on them — it should skip None amounts. See test_total_skips_none_amounts.

title: average() raises ZeroDivisionError on an empty ledger
body: average([]) should return 0, not crash with ZeroDivisionError. See test_average_empty_ledger_is_zero.

title: find_by_desc is vulnerable to SQL injection
body: The description is interpolated straight into the SQL string. A desc like "x' OR '1'='1" dumps the whole table. Use parameterized queries. See test_find_by_desc_is_injection_safe.

title: is_within_budget is wrong when spending equals the limit
body: is_within_budget(100, 100) returns False, but spending exactly up to the limit should count as within budget. See test_is_within_budget_boundary.

title: add_entry shares state between unrelated calls
body: Two independent add_entry() calls accumulate into the same list — the second call sees the first call's entry. Classic mutable default argument. See test_add_entry_does_not_share_state.

title: split_bill loses the cents
body: split_bill(10.0, 4) returns 2.0 instead of 2.5 — it uses integer division and drops the fractional part. See test_split_bill_keeps_cents.

title: page() pagination is off by one page
body: page(entries, 1, 3) returns the second page, not the first. Pages are 1-based, so page 1 should start at index 0. See test_page_is_one_based.
